title: Comptonella baudouinii
taxonomy:
Comptonella baudouinii is classified in the following manner: 
Comptonella baudouinii belongs to the family Rutaceae. It is further classified as a species within the genus Comptonella. The classification of Comptonella baudouinii is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Rosids, Order: Sapindales, Family: Rutaceae, Genus: Comptonella, Species: C. baudouinii. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.

intro: Comptonella baudouinii, also known as Comptonella, is a plant species native to New Caledonia, belonging to the family Rutaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
